userStories.story: As a フリーランス（29歳）, I want to register an account and complete a hotel reservation in one seamless flow on my smartphone, so that I can book trips anytime without needing a PC.
As a mobile user, I want all interactive elements (buttons, links) to be at least 44×44px as per WCAG 2.1, so that I can tap accurately without repeatedly missing targets on my small screen.
As a フリーランス（29歳）, I want to filter and compare hotel plans by price, location, and amenities, so that I can make informed booking decisions without checking multiple external sites.
